title: Start Here
description: New here? This is the right starting point ... a clear, practical introduction to the whole system.
intro: If you are new to Krisada.com, start here. This section introduces Digital Trade Skills for the AI age: how to think about websites as owned digital assets, why most people are still being taught outdated online models, and what it takes to build a real digital presence you actually control in today's internet environment.

seo.title: Start Here ... Krisada.com
seo.description: New to Krisada.com? Start here for the core ideas on online digital life, owned visibility, and building what you own.
